text.title: LLM Fine-tuning (General Guide) — Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying `finetuning`. Each step lists input artifact, action, output artifact. Decision gates live in content/06-decision-tree.xml.

step.name: score-prompt-baseline
step.action: Run baseline; record metric per task.

step.name: score-rag-baseline
step.input: Same eval set + RAG over knowledge base.

step.name: framework-select
step.action: Pick TRL (full FT), Axolotl/LLaMA-Factory (LoRA multi-GPU), Unsloth (QLoRA single GPU), openai-api (API SFT).

step.name: train-and-eval-gate
step.action: Train; run eval-gate; record scores; require ≥2 metrics beat baseline.
